SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.domain

Interface ReferentialAware

public interface ReferentialAware
Interface to be implemented by referential entities that wish to be aware of the failover metadata information. The failover metadata information contains upToDate (Boolean) and asOf (Instant) information.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    setAsOf(Instant asOf)
    Sets the timestamp indicating when the referential value was captured.
    void
    setMetadata(Metadata metadata)
    Sets the metadata holding additional failover information.
    void
    setUpToDate(Boolean upToDate)
    Sets whether the referential value is up-to-date or not.

  • Method Details

    • setUpToDate

      void setUpToDate(Boolean upToDate)
      Sets whether the referential value is up-to-date or not.
      Parameters:
      upToDate - true for a live value, false for a failover-recovered value

    • setAsOf

      void setAsOf(Instant asOf)
      Sets the timestamp indicating when the referential value was captured.
      Parameters:
      asOf - the capture time to set

    • setMetadata

      void setMetadata(Metadata metadata)
      Sets the metadata holding additional failover information.
      Parameters:
      metadata - the metadata to set
